testcase.name: verifyLifeOfTwoInternsArticle
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: .//span[text()='Feel free to send your CV to'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.154, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\WINDOWS\SystemTemp\scope...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:56835}, goog:processID: 14800, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:56835/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.154, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: d788ef32659288ad6a49b647f1062d3f at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.tenforce.pages.BasePage.getText(BasePage.java:50) at com.tenforce.pages.CareerPage.getCVText(CareerPage.java:47) at com.tenforce.tests.TenforceTest.verifyLifeOfTwoInternsArticle(TenforceTest.java:59) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ...
